title: Okay, this unleashed my agent
summary: AI Jason discusses autonomous agent systems including Autoresearch, AutoAgent, and Claude Code with multi-layer memory. The video covers self-evolving mechanisms in Hermes and Openclaw, comparing skill acquisition approaches across different agent frameworks.
